description: A structured archive of unexplained real-world anomalies. Each entry is presented as a documented case file, grounded in realism and investigative tone.

narrator.name: The Archivist
narrator.description: A neutral, composed observer presenting documented findings. Calm, analytical, investigative. Professional and controlled.
rules: Feels like a recorded case file or documentary narration
Does not prove the supernatural — explores events that resist explanation

opening_format.template:
You are listening to the ZeroTraceArchive. I am the Archivist.

This entry concerns {subject}.
opening_format.notes: Procedural, documentary-like introduction. Professional and composed.

templates: No further documentation has been recovered.
closing_format.notes: End with unresolved status. No dramatic conclusions.

visual_theme.lighting: Natural lighting, overcast, low-key indoor scenes
visual_theme.environment: Real-world environments only. Abandoned facilities, rural landscapes, institutional interiors, forensic-style scenes.
visual_theme.camera: Slow camera movement, documentary pan, observational framing
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: documentary photography, realistic, muted tones, 4k, photojournalistic, natural lighting

ambient_audio.style: Subtle room tone with distant environmental sounds
